info.description: This is the API for the Fachprüfungsordnung editor.
info.title: Fachprüfungsordnung API

get.description: Get all documents visible for the user. For super admins, this does not contain all visible documents, as a super admin can see all documents.

post.description: Create a new document with default content

get.description: Retrieve the user's draft text revision for a specific text element, if it exists

delete.description: Delete the user's draft text revision, discarding all unsaved changes

post.description: Publish the user's draft text revision to the main revision tree, potentially creating conflicts

ConflictStatus.description: Status of text revision creation - can be no conflict, conflict with existing revision, or draft created due to AutoSave conflict
